_comment_file: Model Context Protocol (MCP) configuration for Nia Server integration.
_comment_purpose: This file is read by agents (like claude-code) to connect to tools providing real-time codebase awareness.

nia._comment_server_name: The Nia MCP server providing context to the agent.
_comment_capabilities: Repository indexing (vector embeddings of all source files)

_comment_tools.search_codebase: search(query: str) -> relevant code snippets and file paths
_comment_tools.get_dependencies: get_dependencies(file_path: str) -> list of files that import/are imported by this file
_comment_tools.get_recent_changes: get_recent_changes(hours: int) -> files changed in the last N hours
